name: OFFSIDE — The Disagreement Pipeline
description: A visual reference of the OFFSIDE bake orchestration: Docling evidence → granite-embedding per-lens index → four Granite lens readings → Granite Guardian groundedness gate → deterministic SPLIT routing → live falsification probes → frozen fixture. The EXECUTABLE form of this graph is the LangGraph StateGraph in engine/offside_engine/orchestrate/graph.py (run + tested); this canvas is the human-readable map of the same stages.

node.description:
**IBM Docling — Evidence Extraction**

Extracts the IFAB Laws of the Game into structured, page-cited evidence (page number + bounding box + verbatim text). This is the click-to-source spine.

**Granite Embedding + LanceDB — Per-Lens Index**

granite-embedding:30m embeds every evidence atom into a per-lens LanceDB index. Each lens sees only its own evidence via a metadata filter — disagreement emerges because the retrieved evidence differs, not because the tone differs.

**Referee Lens — Granite**

Granite reads only the IFAB Law evidence. Cite-or-die: every sentence cites a real clause, or the lens returns INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE. No numbers, ever.

**Tactical Lens — Granite**

Granite reads only the StatsBomb event aggregate. Reports where the data model strains (a goal forced into the catch-all body-part label 'Other'); never a stat value.

**Historical Lens — Granite**

Granite reads only the curated historical record. Reconstructs what was knowable AT THE MOMENT of the decision versus now — the decision-time deficit, distinct from an irreducible measurement limit.

**Framing Lens — Granite**

Granite reads only named-source quotes. Reports what each NAMED person said; a nationality is never a source. The structural guard against stereotyping.

**Granite Guardian — Groundedness Gate**

A SECOND IBM model audits each lens reading for groundedness against its cited page. Any reading it cannot confirm is demoted to INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE. The build-time trust gate — and the same model the live falsification probes use to overrule the first.

**THE SPLIT — Deterministic Routing**

The gated lens evidence is routed onto the four MECE axes (Rule Ambiguity, Indeterminacy, Decision-Time Deficit, Cultural Prior Bias) by fixed, documented rules — a pure function of the lens signatures. THE SPLIT carries states, never magnitudes.

**Falsification Probes — Self-Attack**

The centerpiece incident is re-run through three live probes via the SAME Granite + Granite Guardian models: FLIP (new evidence moves the axis), NOISE (junk does nothing), OVERREACH (Granite Guardian returns a real UNGROUNDED and overrules the first model). A CI integrity lock fails the build if any verdict is hand-authored.

**Frozen IncidentBundle — Fixture**

The audited bundle (plus any probe outcomes) is frozen to byte-identical JSON with full provenance (models used + corpus git SHA). The web app reads this offline — no model runs at runtime.
